DatalabUIModelExtra.description:
UI rendering hints attached to a model's config via
``model_config['json_schema_extra']['datalab_ui']``.

hidden_fields.description: Inherited field names to hide from the UI for this item type.
hidden_fields.title: Hidden Fields

color.description: Accent colour (CSS hex) used for this item type in the UI.
color.title: Color

section_title.description: Title of the default custom-fields card.
section_title.title: Section Title

DatalabUIModelExtra.title: DatalabUIModelExtra

description: Datalab hints attached to a model via ``model_config['json_schema_extra']``.

datalab_ui.description: UI hints consumed by the web app for this item type as a whole.

datalab_base_type.description: Built-in type this derives from, when not inferable from the class hierarchy.
datalab_base_type.title: Datalab Base Type

title: DatalabModelExtra
